heading: Senior Policy Advisor for Culturally Specific Communities
label: 10455 Senior Policy Advisor for Culturally Specific Communities
notes: Effective DateSection not effective until Oct. 1 of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as a note under , Commerce and Trade.Mar. 15, 2022section 4(a) of div. W of Pub. L. 117–103section 6851 of Title 15

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established in the Office on Violence Against Women a Senior Policy Advisor for Culturally Specific Communities.
advise on the administration of grants related to culturally specific services and contracts with culturally specific organizations;
coordinate development of Federal policy, protocols, and guidelines on matters relating to domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, and stalking in culturally specific communities;
advise the Director on policies, legislation, implementation of laws, and other issues relating to domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, and stalking in culturally specific communities;

provide technical assistance, coordination, and support to other offices and bureaus in the Department of Justice to develop policy and to enforce Federal laws relating to domestic violence, dating violence, sexual assault, and stalking in culturally specific communities;

ensure that appropriate technical assistance, developed and provided by entities with expertise in culturally specific communities, is made available to grantees and potential grantees proposing to serve culturally specific communities;
ensure access to grants and technical assistance for culturally specific organizations; and
analyze the distribution of grant funding in order to identify barriers for culturally specific organizations.

children.heading: Qualifications
children.label: c Qualifications
children.text: Not later than 120 days after , the Director shall hire for the position established under subsection (a) an individual with personal, lived, and work experience from a culturally specific community, and a demonstrated history and expertise addressing domestic violence or sexual assault in a nongovernmental agency.March 15, 2022
